summary: Iteration 22: Table Server Mandatory + Manager/Owner AI Redesign - All PASS. Frontend-only changes tested successfully.

table_server_selector_header_pulse.description: Server selector in header pulses red (animate-pulse + red styling) when no server selected

table_open_form_server_required.description: Open table form server selector shows red border (border-red-500/50) when not selected

table_open_form_error_message.description: Error message 'Server must be selected before opening table' displayed when server not selected

table_open_button_disabled.description: Open button is disabled when server not selected (requires both guest name AND server)

table_context_bar_table_number.description: Context bar shows 'Table #2' prominently with data-testid='ctx-table-name'

table_context_bar_guest_name.description: Context bar shows guest name (John Smith) with data-testid='ctx-guest-name'

table_context_bar_server_name.description: Context bar shows 'Server: Carlos Silva' in blue with data-testid='ctx-server-name'

table_context_bar_id_verified_badge.description: ID Verified badge (green shield icon) shown in context bar with data-testid='id-verified-badge'

manager_ai_analyze_shift_button.description: Analyze This Shift button present and functional in Shift vs Ops section

manager_ai_card_header.description: AI card has formatted header with classification badge (UNDERPERFORMING), copy button, delete button

manager_ai_summary_section.description: Card body has clear 'SUMMARY' section with formatted insight

manager_ai_what_we_see_section.description: Card body has 'WHAT WE SEE' section with detailed analysis

manager_ai_recommended_actions_numbered.description: RECOMMENDED ACTIONS section with numbered items (1, 2, 3...)

manager_ai_next_steps_section.description: NEXT STEPS section present with clickable items

manager_ai_copy_button.description: Copy button present in card header (clipboard icon)

owner_ai_generate_analysis.description: Generate Business Analysis button works and produces AI insight cards

owner_ai_priority_badge.description: Card header has priority badge - CRITICAL (red), WARNING (yellow) badges shown

owner_ai_copy_delete_buttons.description: Copy button and Delete (X) button present in card headers

owner_ai_card_sections.description: Card body has SUMMARY, WHAT WE SEE, RECOMMENDED ACTIONS, NEXT STEPS sections

owner_ai_category_labels.description: Next Steps have category labels: STRATEGY, STAFF, Revenue, Growth visible in UI

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 features verified: (1) Table page - server selection mandatory before opening table with visual feedback (red border, error message, disabled button, pulsing header selector). (2) Context bar shows Table #, Guest, Server, ID Verified badge clearly. (3) Manager AI in Shift vs Ops has redesigned cards with classification badge, copy/delete buttons, Summary/What We See/Recommended Actions/Next Steps sections. (4) Owner AI Insights has similar card design with priority badges (CRITICAL/WARNING), copy/delete buttons, and categorized Next Steps (Strategy/Staff/Revenue/Growth labels).
